riskFailEvents.description: You broke the rules to help out an innocent person. Gain a Contact. What did you do? [CONTACT]
You saved lives, but it had to be covered up. You cannot talk about it. Ever.
Revolution, war or disaster turns your world and relationships upside down.
People in power have been meddling with you, your team and your organisation.
Your achievements were sabotaged by a colleague. Gain an Enemy. [ENEMY]
Get into debt of 4x Career Cash, by turning to criminal world. Why did this happen? [DEBT_4X]
Stressful situations cause a mental collapse. Roll 2D6, on 7 or less, lower Int by 1. [INT_CRISIS]
Great achievements stolen by a rival group or organisation, taking all the credit.
You get the blame for a disaster that killed or injured several people.
Badly injured. Lower Str, Dex or End by 1. How did it happen? Leave the Career. [INJURED_LEAVE]

riskSuccessEvents.description: Betrayed by a close friend, now an Enemy. Gain a useful friend-of-a-friend Contact. [ENEMY][CONTACT]
Romance that continues today, or ended on a good note. Gain a Friend. [FRIEND]
Uncover a dangerous secret about a person or organisation. Gain Bribery-1. [SKILL:Bribery:1]
Gain fame and recognition in your career for deserved actions. Gain +1 Soc. [SOC_PLUS1]
An intense situation was survived with a colleague. Make a Friend. [FRIEND]
Fast dates and partying. Gain Carousing-1. [SKILL:Carousing:1]
Conflict became a part of your life. Gain +1 Str. What was going on? [STR_PLUS1]
Make a good Friend in your own career or organization. [FRIEND]
Tragic love affair. Roll 1D6: 1-2 They died; 3-4 They Vanished; 5-6 They are still around.
After an incident you are pushed into a backroom job. Gain Computer-1. [SKILL:Computer:1]
Gain a powerful Contact in the organisation. What did you do to gain this contact? [CONTACT]
A romance expanded your horizons. Gain +1 Edu. Are you still in love, or is it over? [EDU_PLUS1]
You scored big this term. Gain Cr20,000. How did you get this money? [CASH_20000]
You are thrown into a crisis and take charge. Gain Leader-1. [SKILL:Leader:1]
Caused someone to be humiliated or demoted. Gain an Enemy. [ENEMY]
Chance to make it big! Roll 2D6: on 4+ gain automatic promotion and one extra skill roll; on 2-3 you spend this term in prison (lower Soc by 1, gain a criminal Contact). [AUTO_PROMO_OR_PRISON]

promotionFailEvents.description: You were second choice, they like you! Gain a Contact and +2 on next term's attempt. [CONTACT][PROMO_BONUS_2]
Something about your personality means you got overlooked. What is it?
Your superior sabotaged your chances, he needs you where you are.
A rival got the position you were after, now making your life hell. Gain an Enemy. [ENEMY]
You tried for promotion but failed. C'est la vie.
Too many small screw ups this term. What were they?
You're too involved with romance. Gain a romantic Friend. [FRIEND]
People around you messed up and made you look bad. What did they do?
You broke a lot of rules to get the job done. Too many rules. What was the job?
You presided over a disaster and the stigma will stay with you for years. Gain -1 on next term's promotion attempt. [PROMO_PENALTY_1]

promotionSuccessEvents.description: A colleague colluded to make you look good. Now this Enemy has a hold over you. [ENEMY]
Your promotion was built on lies and false achievements. Only you know this secret.
Promotion means a transfer. Lose one Friend or Contact.
You beat a friend to the promotion, they are bitter. Make an Enemy. [ENEMY]
You now owe a favour to a senior officer. Make a note of this.
You scraped past, it doesn't look good. You spend this term proving yourself.
You did great work, and you've been recognized with promotion! Gain +1 Edu. [EDU_PLUS1]
You won promotion and an award, accolade or fame. What great thing did you do?
A senior officer acts as a patron, ally and Contact. [CONTACT]
You broke the rules to win big. They had to promote you when they wanted to fire you.
Gain an extra Benefit roll when you leave the Career. [EXTRA_BENEFIT]

benefitsTable.description: Weapon or rare/custom piece of equipment (up to Cr5,000) [WEAPON]

leavingTableA: You know a dark secret — and fled.
You seek a missing friend or relative.
New identity to hide from agents or criminals.
leavingTableB: The job isn't what it was.
You screwed up and bailed out.
At war with your colleagues too much.
